|         Group  |
|                |
| +----------+   |      +----------+
| |  Target  |<--+------+  Source  |
| +----------+   |      +----------+
|                |
|  +---------+   |    +------------+
|  |  Other  |<--+----+  External  |
|  +---------+   |    +------------+
|                |
|                |
+----------------+
